creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Graham,

Sorry for the late reply, but it sounds that the issue is
not coming from the path having a // in a path is quite usual
has has no impact on apps. AFAIK, it seems that you uppercate
the plugin name.

pkg uses plugin name as-is to search for an existing .so file
and perform a dlopen on it.

If for any reason you think that I misunderstood your request,
or if you need additional help, feel free to reply on this PR.

All the best,
-- rodrigo
